channel.title: Victor Zhang | Mobile & Systems Engineer | Apps from Device to Cloud
channel.description: Mobile and systems engineer building reliable, data-heavy product systems across iOS, React Native, device sync, backend flows, and telemetry.

item.title: From Structure to Semantics: Using TEC-FIT for Executable Semantics
item.description: How TEC-FIT emerges from the core ideas of Domain-Driven Design and Designing Data-Intensive Applications.

item.title: Choosing the Right JavaScript Data Visualization Framework: Insights and Comparisons
item.description: A comprehensive guide comparing popular JavaScript data visualization frameworks to help you choose the right tool for your project

item.title: Keeping Domain Semantics Intact in a Transaction App
item.description: A practical framework for maintaining domain semantics in a transaction app across contracts, validators, policies, projections, UI states, and regression boundaries.

item.title: TokenChef (Part 2): Chief Token Orchestrator — Manage Claude, Codex, and Gemini as a Structured Software Team
item.description: Spawning parallel agents is easy. Spawning them without hitting token limits, context pollution, or review bottlenecks is hard. Discover why you need a structured, layered team architecture.

item.title: MetalSolo (Part 3): Colored ICP Point Cloud Registration in 3D Scanning / MetalSolo（第三篇）：3D 扫描中的 Colored ICP 点云配准算法
item.description: How to solve the sliding ambiguity in 3D reconstruction using multi-scale Colored ICP, custom Metal rendering pipelines, and volumetric SLAM fusion.

item.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG): The Power of Hybrid Search
item.description: An in-depth exploration of RAG, comparing vector and keyword retrieval, understanding hybrid search strategies, and why RAG is essential for modern LLM applications.

item.title: MetalSolo (Part 2): Sacred Geometry of Stylus Input & Ink Engine Math / MetalSolo（第二篇）：触控笔输入与笔迹引擎的几何数学公式
item.description: Why triangles and Bezier curves are the foundation of vector ink, detailing our Catmull-Rom smoothing algorithms, variable-width tessellation math, and dynamic end-cap rendering.

item.title: MetalSolo (Part 1): Metal + SwiftUI Layer Compositing & Lifecycle Gotchas / MetalSolo（第一篇）：Metal + SwiftUI 图层合成与生命周期陷阱
item.description: Three bugs that had no warnings, no crashes, and no obvious causes. Just a blank canvas staring back at me at 2am. Here's what I learned building 8 Strokes.

item.title: Essential React State Management: Common Pitfalls and Best Practices
item.description: Learn critical React state management patterns and avoid common mistakes that lead to bugs and performance issues

item.title: Board Game AI Development: From Minimax to Modern Deep Learning
item.description: Exploring the evolution of artificial intelligence in board games, from classical algorithms to modern machine learning approaches

item.title: TokenChef (Part 1): Vibe Coding with Git Worktrees — A Playbook Most Devs Are Missing
item.description: Most people vibe-code with one model in one branch. Here is how to use multiple models, git worktrees, and a phased workflow to ship refactors without breaking everything.

item.title: TokenChef (Part 3): wtcraft — A Lightweight, Git-Native Scaffolding for Bounded Multi-Agent Coding
item.description: How do you actually enforce boundaries on autonomous agents? Explore Harness Engineering, the competitive landscape of task contracts, and how the wtcraft CLI implements bounded sandboxes locally.

item.title: TokenChef (Part 4): Stop Reinventing the Agent — wtcraft Boundaries, Ledgers & Sign-off First / 别卷 Agent 了：wtcraft 要先把边界、账本和验收做好
item.description: 从 Claude Code 源码泄露与 CCB 逆向架构出发，用同一套六层架构对比 Codex 和 Claude Code，得出结论：wtcraft 不该再造 runtime，而该把任务边界、运行账本和验收流程做扎实。
